executive.title: Executive Overview
executive.meta: Company headcount, vacancies, pipeline & sourcing across all stores.
executive.notAvailableHint: The executive overview is limited to company-wide leadership roles.

login.heroDesc: AI-assisted screening, ranked inboxes, and a single source of truth — from application to onboarding, across every store.
login.title: Sign in to the console
login.subtitle: Continue to the recruitment command center.
login.helpEntra: Sign in with your Microsoft organization account, or with an email and password provisioned by your administrator. Access and role permissions are managed centrally.
login.helpDev: Development sign-in for the screening team. Production access uses Microsoft Entra ID single sign-on or an administrator-provisioned password.
